mano_cua.result_summary: 图片模态窗口存在严重CSS/渲染Bug：URL输入框和Alt文本输入框不可见(高度为0或被隐藏)，标签文字可见但输入框消失，点击输入区域输入文字不显示。图片占位符和底部Media浏览器区域正常
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The image insertion modal has a confirmed visual/functional bug: URL and Alt text input fields are invisible (zero height or hidden). Labels are visible but input elements are not rendered. Typing text while the URL area is focused does not produce visible text. Image placeholder and Media browser section work correctly.
